quests.name: Goblin Cull
quests.description: The goblins east of the village grow bolder every day. Thin their numbers before they raid us.

quests.name: Word to the Watch
quests.description: Carry word of the goblin raids to the guard posted on the east road. She should hear it from one of us.

objectives.label: Find the guard on the east road

quests.name: Scout the Camp
quests.description: Before the watch can act, we need eyes on the goblin camp. Get close enough to count their tents and come back alive.
